heading: This Afternoon
text: Variable clouds. An isolated shower possible, except scattered near and north of Route 2, and in the White Mountains; chance of thunder early, along and east of the Greens. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80, with some lower 70s northeast, and mid to upper 60s in far northern New York. South to southwest winds 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph, and becoming west late.

heading: Tonight
text: Slight chance of an early shower or sprinkle in the northern mountains, otherwise clearing, except gradual clearing northeast. Areas of valley fog. Lows from the upper 40s to mid 50s, some upper 50s in the Champlain Valley. Northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, decreasing to light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly to partly sunny after any early fog. Highs in the mid to upper 70s, some lower 70s northeast and in the Adirondacks. West winds 5 to 10 mph.
